global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with geometric shapes and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a new season of content for the app MoonScreen.

elements.label: Orange gradient background
elements.description: A smooth orange gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: Abstract geometric shapes in lighter shades of orange, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Overlay shapes
elements.description: Translucent overlay shapes in a lighter hue, adding depth to the top section.

elements.label: Central square
elements.description: A large, centered square shape in a lighter color, creating a focal point.

elements.label: App interface
elements.description: A rectangular area showcasing a simplified app interface, positioned in the center.

elements.label: Additional shape
elements.description: Another rectangular shape that adds visual interest, located in the center.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circular element positioned towards the bottom center.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: Another small circular element, slightly offset from the previous one.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A third small circular element, completing a trio at the bottom center.

elements.label: Small rectangle
elements.description: A small rectangular shape located in the center, possibly for additional content.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: Bold text stating 'A new season drops New hits every week', prominently displayed at the bottom.
elements.text_content: A new season drops New hits every week

elements.label: App logo
elements.description: The logo 'MoonScreen' in a simple font, located at the top left.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A button labeled 'Shop now' at the bottom, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: Text labeled 'UGC' in a small font, positioned at the top left.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the bottom, the logo is at the top left, and the call to action is centered at the bottom.
